bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p WHERE p.cedula = cedula AND p.movil = 'TIRAN224' AND UPPER(COALESCE(p.estado, '')) = 'ACTIVO') GROUP BY codigo, '') AS mov LEFT JOIN base_codigos AS cat ON
